# מגן עסק — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Dmitry Mordov is an independent IT infrastructure, cybersecurity, and business continuity (DR) consultant with 20+ years of enterprise-level experience working with Israel's top financial institutions, industrial companies, and media organizations. His unique value proposition is bringing Fortune-500-grade protection standards to small and medium-sized businesses at SMB-friendly pricing, without replacing existing vendors or creating hidden costs. He positions himself as a completely independent advisor with zero vendor commissions, offering a bold guarantee: if clients don't receive 3 actionable insights from the free diagnostic call, he donates ₪500 to a charity of their choice. The brand tone is authoritative, trustworthy, urgent, and results-driven — emphasizing peace of mind, real-world resilience, and no-nonsense expertise.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://example.com
ייעוץ אבטחת סייבר ותשתיות IT עצמאי ובלתי תלוי. דמיטרי מורדוב מביא 20+ שנות ניסיון ברמת Fortune 500 לעסקים קטנים ובינוניים, במחיר הוגן וללא עמלות סמויות. תאם שיחת אבחון חינמית עוד היום.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel, required)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About מגן עסק
Dmitry Mordov is an independent IT infrastructure, cybersecurity, and business continuity (DR) consultant with 20+ years of enterprise-level experience working with Israel's top financial institutions, industrial companies, and media organizations. His unique value proposition is bringing Fortune-500-grade protection standards to small and medium-sized businesses at SMB-friendly pricing, without replacing existing vendors or creating hidden costs. He positions himself as a completely independent advisor with zero vendor commissions, offering a bold guarantee: if clients don't receive 3 actionable insights from the free diagnostic call, he donates ₪500 to a charity of their choice. The brand tone is authoritative, trustworthy, urgent, and results-driven — emphasizing peace of mind, real-world resilience, and no-nonsense expertise.

## Services/Products
- סקר חוסן תשתיות - זיהוי צווארי בקבוק ותצורות מסוכנות
- אבטחת סייבר - הקשחת תשתיות והפחתת סיכון כופרה ב-90%
- תכנית המשכיות עסקית ו-DR - חזרה לפעילות תוך 4 שעות

## Target Audience
- בעלי עסקים ומנכ"לים של חברות קטנות ובינוניות
- בעלי עסקים קטנים ובינוניים
- מייסדי סטארטאפ בתחום הטכנולוגיה
- מנהלי IT בעסקים קטנים ובינוניים

## Industry
IT Consulting & Cybersecurity
